scenario: A couple planning their wedding, making the big decisions that shape the whole event.

decisions.title: What Kind of Venue?
decisions.description: The venue sets the tone for everything: the dress code, the menu, the flowers, the photos.

options.title: Rustic Barn
options.subtitle: Countryside charm, string lights, natural wood, relaxed elegance

options.title: Urban Rooftop
options.subtitle: City skyline views, modern minimalist, cocktail-style energy

options.title: Garden Estate
options.subtitle: Manicured grounds, tented reception, classic romance

options.title: Beach Celebration
options.subtitle: Waterfront ceremony, barefoot elegance, sunset reception

decisions.title: How Should Guests Experience the Day?
decisions.description: The format of the reception shapes how people connect, eat, and remember the evening.

options.title: Traditional Seated
options.subtitle: Formal dinner, assigned tables, multi-course meal

options.title: Stations & Mingling
options.subtitle: Food stations, open seating, cocktail-party energy

options.title: Family Style
options.subtitle: Long communal tables, shared platters, conversation-driven

options.title: Progressive Party
options.subtitle: Ceremony in one spot, appetizers in another, dinner in a third

decisions.title: How Do We Capture the Day?
decisions.description: Your photos and videos are the only thing that lasts forever from the wedding day.

options.title: Editorial & Posed
options.subtitle: Magazine-quality portraits, dramatic lighting, curated shots

options.title: Documentary Style
options.subtitle: Candid moments, minimal posing, storytelling approach

options.title: Film & Digital Hybrid
options.subtitle: Mix of film grain and digital clarity, artistic look

options.title: Photo + Video Package
options.subtitle: Full coverage both mediums, cinematic highlight reel
